name: golang-github-kisom-goutils-dev
title: golang-github-kisom-goutils-dev
summary: Various TLS certificate tools and other utility libraries for Golang
description:
Various TLS certificate tools and other utility libraries for Golang
This package contains a collection of utility libraries for Golang, as well
as an assortment of tools mainly for displaying information about TLS
certificates and keys.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-kisom-goutils-dev because Various TLS certificate tools and other utility libraries for Golang.

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-kisom-goutils-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-kisom-goutils-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
